gitlab_external_url.label: External URL
gitlab_external_url.help: GitLab 对外完整 URL（含协议）。生产 https://...。所有 webhook / clone URL 基于此。**改后整体重启 + 可能要改 LFS 等子服务**。
gitlab_external_url.helpEn: Full GitLab public URL with protocol. All webhooks / clone URLs based on this.

gitlab_root_password.label: Root 密码
gitlab_root_password.help: GitLab root admin 密码。留空 = 自动 24 位。**仅首次启动设**——之后改密码用 UI。
gitlab_root_password.helpEn: GitLab root admin password. Empty = auto 24 chars. Only set on first launch.

gitlab_data_dir.label: 数据目录
gitlab_data_dir.help: GitLab 配置 + PG 数据 + git 仓库 + uploads。可达数十 GB。
gitlab_data_dir.helpEn: GitLab config + PG data + git repos + uploads. Can grow to 10s GB.

gitlab_http_port.label: HTTP 端口
gitlab_http_port.help: GitLab HTTP 端口。生产用反代到 443。
gitlab_http_port.helpEn: HTTP port. Use reverse proxy for 443 in production.

gitlab_https_port.label: HTTPS 端口
gitlab_https_port.help: GitLab 内置 HTTPS 端口（少用——一般反代）。
gitlab_https_port.helpEn: Built-in HTTPS port (rarely used, prefer reverse proxy).

gitlab_ssh_port.label: Git SSH 端口
gitlab_ssh_port.help: Git clone via SSH 端口。**不能与 sshd 22 冲突**——所以默认 2222。clone URL 自动生成 ssh://git@host:2222/...
gitlab_ssh_port.helpEn: Git SSH port. Cannot conflict with sshd 22, so default 2222. Clone URL auto-generated.
